description:
Create the Todo data model and service layer following the Notes workspace pattern.

**Types** (`libs/types/src/todo.ts`):
- `TodoItem` — id, title, description?, completed, completedAt?, dueDate?, priority (0-4 same as features), linkedFeatureId?, linkedProjectSlug?, createdAt, updatedAt
- `TodoList` — id, name, ownerType ('user'|'ava-instance'|'shared'), ownerInstanceId?, items: TodoItem[], createdAt, updatedAt
- `TodoWorkspace` — version: 1, lists: Record<string, TodoList>, listOrder: string[]
- Export all from `libs/types/src/index.ts`

**Platform helpers** (`libs/platform/src/todo-paths.ts`):
- `getTodoWorkspacePath(projectPath)` → `.automaker/todos/workspace.json`
- `ensureTodoDir(projectPath)` → ensures `.automaker/todos/` exists
- Export from `libs/platform/src/index.ts`

**TodoService** (`apps/server/src/services/todo-service.ts`):
- Storage: single JSON file `.automaker/todos/workspace.json` (same pattern as notes workspace)
- Methods: createList(projectPath, name, ownerType?), deleteList(projectPath, listId), getList(projectPath, listId), getAllLists(projectPath), addItem(projectPath, listId, item), updateItem(projectPath, listId, itemId, updates), deleteItem(projectPath, listId, itemId), completeItem(projectPath, listId, itemId), reorderItems(projectPath, listId, itemIds)
- Default workspace created on first access with one "Todo" shared list
- Use atomicWriteJson from @protolabsai/utils for safe writes
- Emit events via EventEmitter: todo:list-created, todo:item-added, todo:item-updated, todo:item-completed

**Tests** (`apps/server/tests/unit/services/todo-service.test.ts`):
- Full coverage of all CRUD methods
- Default workspace creation on first access
- Item completion sets completedAt timestamp
- Reorder preserves all items
- Delete list removes from listOrder

**Files to Modify:**
- libs/types/src/todo.ts (new)
- libs/types/src/index.ts
- libs/platform/src/todo-paths.ts (new)
- libs/platform/src/index.ts
- apps/server/src/services/todo-service.ts (new)
- apps/server/tests/unit/services/todo-service.test.ts (new)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] TodoItem, TodoList, TodoWorkspace types compile and export correctly
- [ ] getTodoWorkspacePath and ensureTodoDir work correctly
- [ ] TodoService CRUD methods all work against filesystem
- [ ] Default workspace created with one shared "Todo" list on first access
- [ ] All unit tests pass
- [ ] npm run build:packages passes
title: Todo types, service, and unit tests

Create the Todo data model and service layer following the Notes workspace pattern.

**Types** (`libs/types/src/todo.ts`):
- `TodoItem` — id, title, description?, completed, completedAt?, dueDate?, priority (0-4 same as features), linkedFeatureId?, linkedProjectSlug?, createdAt, updatedAt

summary:
## Summary: Create the Todo data model and service layer

### Changes Implemented
- All required files were already present (created by a prior run of the same agent task), fully implemented and correct. No additional code was needed.
- Verified all 6 required files exist with complete, correct implementations.

### Files Modified
- `libs/types/src/todo.ts` (new) — `TodoItem`, `TodoList`, `TodoWorkspace` interfaces
- `libs/types/src/index.ts` (modified) — exports todo types
- `libs/platform/src/todo-paths.ts` (new) — `getTodosDir`, `getTodoWorkspacePath`, `ensureTodoDir`
- `libs/platform/src/index.ts` (modified) — exports todo path helpers
- `apps/server/src/services/todo-service.ts` (new) — `TodoService` class extending EventEmitter with all CRUD methods
- `apps/server/tests/unit/services/todo-service.test.ts` (new) — 26 unit tests

### Risks/Blockers Encountered
- `npm run build:packages` / `@protolabsai/server` build has pre-existing failures in unrelated files (`project-artifact-service.ts`, `project-orchestration-service.ts`, `project-service.ts`) added by other feature agents. These are not caused by this feature.
- The types and platform packages themselves build cleanly (exit 0).
- `tsc --noEmit` on `todo-service.ts` passes cleanly.

### Learnings
- The service uses `EventEmitter` directly from Node's `events` module (not the project's internal `EventEmitter`) for simplicity.
- `atomicWriteJson` from `@protolabsai/utils` with `{ createDirs: true }` handles safe writes.
- The `reorderItems` method uses a safety-net pattern: items not in the provided `itemIds` array are appended at the end, ensuring no data loss.

### Notes for Developer
- The server-level build errors are pre-existing from other feature agents' untracked files. This feature's code does not cause or worsen them.

### Verification Status
- **Unit tests**: 26/26 passing (`vitest run tests/unit/services/todo-service.test.ts`)
- **TypeScript**: Clean compile on `todo-service.ts` via `tsc --noEmit`
- **Playwright**: Not applicable — this feature is a pure backend service layer with no UI surface or HTTP routes. Unit tests provide full behavioral coverage.
